# WhatsGoodMGM

> A free, community-made guide to what's good in Montgomery, Alabama. We track
> local events - music, art, food, markets, nightlife, family, community - and
> curate them into a simple weekly list so anyone can find something to do in
> the Gump. No ads, no algorithm, no paywall.

## Key pages

- [/events](/events): every upcoming event, with filters for category, interest, price (free), and date window. The best single place to see what's happening.
- [/map](/map): the same upcoming events plotted on a map of Montgomery by venue.
- [/archive](/archive): past events and past weekly picks, for reference and history.
- [/submit](/submit): organizers and locals can submit an event for review.
- [/about](/about): who makes this, why, and how it works.

## Data provenance

- Curated by locals, by hand. Events are reviewed before they publish.
- Sourced primarily from the r/Montgomery weekly "Things To Do In Montgomery" (TNTDIM) lists and directly from venues and organizers.
- Every event page links back to its original source so you can verify details and get tickets.

## Update cadence

- The weekly pick and event lists refresh every Thursday.
- Times are Central Time (America/Chicago).

## Structured data

- Each event detail page (`/events/{slug}`) carries schema.org Event JSON-LD (name, startDate, location, offers, organizer, geo) so machines can read event details directly.
- The home page carries schema.org WebSite JSON-LD with a search action.
